name: Newfield National Bank
description_short: Newfield National Bank is a full-service bank offering personal and business checking, savings, loans, credit cards, and digital banking services with FDIC protection.
description_long:
Newfield National Bank operates as a traditional community bank providing comprehensive financial services to consumers and businesses. The institution is accessible online at newfieldnationalbank.bank and maintains physical branch locations, positioning itself as a conventional banking alternative.

The bank's service portfolio includes personal and business checking accounts, savings products, credit cards, debit cards, personal loans, mortgage lending, home equity loans, auto loans, and investment services. They offer digital banking channels including online banking, mobile banking, mobile wallet integration, bill pay functionality, e-statements, remote deposit capture, and telephone banking. Business customers have access to positive pay fraud prevention services.

Newfield National Bank distinguishes itself through account options tailored to specific demographics, including student checking for ages 16-23 and a general consumer checking product. The New Jersey Consumer Checking account requires only a $50 minimum deposit and $1 daily balance, with unlimited check writing and no per-check fees. They provide FDIC insurance protection up to $250,000 and tie-in capabilities allowing customers to consolidate multiple account statements.

As a traditional bank, Newfield National Bank serves customers seeking conventional banking relationships with physical locations, established regulatory protections, and multi-channel access. However, the website content lacks specific information about interest rates, account fees beyond minimum balance penalties, loan terms, credit card APRs, and competitive positioning—limiting ability to assess whether their offerings are competitive relative to other banks or fintech alternatives.
services: Personal checking accounts (NJ Consumer and Student varieties)
Debit cards and contactless debit cards
pros: Low opening deposit requirement of $50 for New Jersey Consumer Checking and Student Checking accounts
Unlimited check writing without per-check fees on checking accounts
Student checking available for ages 16-23 with parental co-signer option for under-18 customers
FDIC insurance protection up to $250,000 on deposits
Multiple digital banking channels including mobile banking, online banking, bill pay, and remote deposit capture
Tie-in option allowing multiple accounts to share one monthly statement
Direct deposit availability on checking accounts
Debit cards available with relatively low $100 minimum balance requirement
cons: $3 monthly service charge on checking accounts if minimum daily balance of $1 is not maintained
Non-interest bearing checking accounts offer no yield on deposits
Website lacks transparent disclosure of interest rates, fee schedules, loan terms, and credit card APRs
Restriction limiting customers to only one personal checking account across all institutions
Limited information about branch locations or service areas provided on website
best_for: Students ages 16-23 seeking a basic checking account with low opening requirements
New Jersey consumers wanting traditional banking with FDIC protection and multiple service channels
Business owners needing checking accounts with fraud prevention tools like positive pay
Customers preferring established banks with physical locations over digital-only alternatives
diagnosis: Newfield National Bank is best for consumers seeking traditional banking services with FDIC protections, physical branch access, and multi-channel digital options, particularly students and New Jersey residents. The main caveat is that the website provides insufficient transparency on competitive rates, comprehensive fee structures, and loan terms, making it difficult to assess relative value compared to other banking options.
typical_results_timeline: Account opening typically takes 1-3 business days. Loan decisions vary by product.
